mapper.sql: select u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.real_name, u.email, u.avatar, u.phonenumber, u.password, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.pwd_update_date, u.zid, u.create_by, u.create_time, u.remark, d.dept_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.dept_name, d.order_num, d.leader, d.status as dept_status, r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.data_scope, r.status as role_status from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id
mapper.select:
select distinct u.user_id, u.dept_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.create_time from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id where u.del_flag = '0' and (r.role_id != #{roleId} or r.role_id IS NULL) and u.user_id not in (select u.user_id from sys_user u inner join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id and ur.role_id = #{roleId})
AND u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND u.phonenumber like concat('%', #{phonenumber}, '%')
${params.dataScope}
select user_id, user_name from sys_user where user_name = #{userName} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select user_id, phonenumber from sys_user where phonenumber = #{phonenumber} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select user_id, email from sys_user where email = #{email} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select user_id, user_name, nick_name, real_name, phonenumber, sex, password, status, del_flag, avatar, zid from sys_user where phonenumber = #{phonenumber} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select user_id, user_name, nick_name, real_name, phonenumber, sex, password, status, del_flag, avatar, zid from sys_user where zid = #{zid} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select user_id, user_name, nick_name, real_name, phonenumber, sex, password, status, del_flag, avatar, zid, id_card from sys_user where id_card = #{idCard} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user( user_id, dept_id, user_name, nick_name, real_name, email, avatar, phonenumber, id_card, sex, password, status, pwd_update_date, zid, create_by, remark, create_time )values( #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{userName}, #{nickName}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{phonenumber}, #{idCard}, #{sex}, #{password}, #{status}, #{pwdUpdateDate}, #{zid}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update sys_user set status = #{status}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set avatar = #{avatar}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set login_ip = #{loginIp}, login_date = #{loginDate} where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set pwd_update_date = sysdate(), password = #{password}, update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: update sys_user set del_flag = '2' where user_id = #{userId}

update sys_user set del_flag = '2' where user_id in
#{userId}
mapper.select:
select u.user_id, u.nick_name, u.real_name, u.user_name, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.status, u.avatar, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_time, u.remark, (select count(*) from elder_family ef where ef.user_id = u.user_id and ef.status = '0') as elder_count, e.elder_id, e.elder_name, ef.relation_name, e.id_card, e.age, e.gender, e.phone, e.status as elder_status from sys_user u left join elder_family ef on u.user_id = ef.user_id and ef.status = '0' left join elder_info e on ef.elder_id = e.elder_id where u.del_flag = '0' and u.user_id > 100 and u.user_name not like 'jg%' and u.user_name not like 'elder_%' and u.phonenumber is not null and u.phonenumber != '' and u.phonenumber REGEXP '^1[3-9][0-9]{9}$'
AND u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND (u.nick_name like concat('%', #{nickName}, '%') OR u.real_name like concat('%', #{nickName}, '%'))
AND u.phonenumber like concat('%', #{phonenumber}, '%')
AND u.status = #{status}
AND date_format(u.create_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(u.create_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by u.create_time desc

select u.user_id, u.nick_name, u.real_name, u.user_name, u.phonenumber, u.sex, u.status, u.avatar, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_time, u.remark, (select count(*) from elder_family ef where ef.user_id = u.user_id and ef.status = '0') as elder_count, e.elder_id, e.elder_name, ef.relation_name, e.id_card, e.age, e.gender, e.phone, e.status as elder_status from sys_user u left join elder_family ef on u.user_id = ef.user_id and ef.status = '0' left join elder_info e on ef.elder_id = e.elder_id where u.user_id = #{userId} and u.del_flag = '0'
